name: Older-adult urolithin A glucose-metabolism registry is recruiting with no posted results
summary: NCT06274749 is directly relevant older-adult urolithin A registry context, but it has no posted results and cannot change the public stage.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06274749 as a recruiting 180-participant randomized urolithin A trial in adults aged 55 to 100 years, with glucose, mitochondrial respiration, brain oxidative metabolism, and microbiome endpoints and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment is 180; registry status is recruiting; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The primary endpoint is glucose metabolism rather than an aging functional endpoint.
Results would need to tie mitochondrial measures to meaningful function before changing the mitophagy stage.
